screenshot_reviews.remarks: Layout matches Figma design exactly. Grid is aligned. Glow effects render smoothly on Chrome.
Health indicators are visible. The pulsating dot renders correctly.
Process stages are mapped. Text sizes are readable.
Checklists are aligned. Link tags are correctly formatted.
Blocked actions table renders properly. Visual indicators are clear.
Checklist elements render with correct padding.
Mocks and read-only indicators are visible.
Model mesh topology rendering is aligned.
Runbook sections render with correct contrast.
Index listings render with appropriate spacers.
Closeout parameters display in correct fonts.
